summary: Iter49 retest — Legacy PATCH /admin/jobs/{id} shadow handler REMOVAL verified end-to-end. All requested backend + frontend flows now pass. server.py:3536-3542 is now a comment-only stub; router at routers/admin_jobs.py:199 (AdminJobPatchBody) is the sole handler. Backend: added new pytest suite tests/test_iter49_admin_patch_retest.py (5 tests — full walk-in body patch with status='open' + status='closed' + status='draft' + invalid contact_number/email → 400) — 5/5 PASS. Regression: iter45 admin_jobs suite still 16/16 PASS. Total 21/21 PASS. Frontend E2E (viewport 414x896, admin@referme.app): (1) Edit Live job Save & Publish → EXACTLY ONE PATCH 200 + 'Job Updated 🎉' alert + redirect to /admin/my-posted-jobs + edited title visible in row + no duplicate creation. (2) Save Draft on newly-created draft → PATCH 200 + 'Draft Updated' alert + redirect + title updated in row. (3) NEW mode POST → 200 + 'Job Published 🎉' + redirect. No React Native red screens, no console errors of substance (only shadow*/pointerEvents deprecation warnings). Iter48's blocker is fully resolved.

react_native_issues.issue: Console emits repeated deprecation warning "'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'." — RN Web deprecation across many cards/buttons. Cosmetic only, not blocking any flow.
Console warning "props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents" — RN Web deprecation. Cosmetic.

action_items: None blocking for the current retest scope — all requested assertions pass.

(Optional, from iter48 code-review carryover) Sweep server.py for other legacy handlers that may still shadow endpoints extracted into routers/*. Consider adding a startup assertion that fails if any (method, path) is registered twice (FastAPI won't warn on duplicates).
(Optional, non-critical) Address RN Web deprecation warnings ('shadow*' → 'boxShadow', 'props.pointerEvents' → 'style.pointerEvents') across shared card/button components.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/admin_jobs.py PATCH handler correctly whitelists fields, validates contact_number/email/dates via _validate_common, and keeps denormalised fields (employer_name, open_positions_label, verification_status when status='open') in sync — clean implementation.
server.py is still ~3933 lines. Continue extracting resource domains to routers/ as done for admin_jobs to prevent future shadow-route regressions.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter49_admin_patch_retest.py (new — 5 tests covering the exact regressions from iter48)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 E2E flows: edit-publish PATCH200 + 'Job Updated 🎉' + redirect + no duplicate; draft PATCH200 + 'Draft Updated'; new POST200 + 'Job Published 🎉')

seed_data_creation: No permanent seed added. Transient TEST-Iter49 jobs (c66fc3f7 draft, f3a39dbe live) created during frontend E2E were cleaned up via DELETE /api/admin/jobs/{id}. Remaining admin job: dfa59a3a-ebe7-46c1-a6ce-a1696d7f8882 (iter45 seed, title now 'Iter45 Walk-in Retest d7881 — v49retest' after edit-flow retest — same document, no duplicate).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter49 fully green. If a future iteration touches server.py or admin_jobs router, re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter49_admin_patch_retest.py /app/backend/tests/test_iter45_admin_jobs.py -v (expect 21/21). The new iter49 suite specifically pins: (a) PATCH accepts full walk-in body with status='open' and persists ALL fields, (b) status='closed' and status='draft' both accepted (regression pin for the iter48 shadow bug), (c) invalid contact_number/email return 400. These would immediately catch a re-introduction of the legacy shadow handler.
rca_of_issue: Iter48 root cause (legacy PATCH handler in server.py shadowing router) — confirmed resolved this iteration. server.py:3536-3542 now contains only a documentation comment noting the migration; there is no remaining @api.patch decorator for /admin/jobs/{job_id} in server.py (grep verified: only GET/DELETE/POST verify endpoints remain in server.py for admin/jobs). The router-based handler (routers/admin_jobs.py:199) is now the sole registered PATCH route, accepts AdminJobPatchBody with full walk-in schema + status draft|open|closed, and end-to-end returns 200 for all requested payloads. Frontend has not changed since iter48 (already correct) and now succeeds because backend accepts its payload.
